title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Today's moderation review addressed 2 high-severity reports:

1. spam_wave_42 — Banned. Posted phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Immediate action taken to protect the community.

2. toxic_runner — Banned. Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Zero tolerance for hostile behavior toward new members.

Both reports have been closed. If you witness similar activity, please use the report tool — every report helps keep the community safe.
